The '''Neimoidian Inner Circle''' was a governing body of the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]] of [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]] and the [[Purse world/Legends|Purse worlds]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It might have been ruled by the [[Trade monarch/Legends|trade monarch]].

==History==
It had close ties with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], whose [[Viceroy of the Trade Federation/Legends|Commanding Viceroy]], if a Neimoidian, served as the leader of the Inner Circle. The Inner Circle was supposedly subordinate to the [[Trade monarch/Legends|trade monarch]].

[[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] was the only known leader of the Inner Circle, though presuming it was still in operation at the time, after the end on the clone wars, and Nute Gunray's murder at the hands of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] the inner circle was most likely led by Acting Viceroy, [[Sentepeth Findos]].
